name: Cannelloni with Cheese & Spinach
recipeIngredient: 2 x 225g bags of microwave-in-the-bag fresh young leaf spinach
300 g mascarpone cheese or cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach according to the packet instructions. Place the lasagne in a bowl and pour boiling water over to cover. Allow to soak for two minutes.
2. Meanwhile, place the ricotta, mascarpone, egg yolk, Parmesan in a food processor and mix. Add the drained spinach and process again. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg.
3. Preheat the oven to 180C/350F/Gas 4. Place a spoonful of the mixture on a drained sheet of lasagne. Fold over to enclose the filling and place in a greased ovenproof dish, folded side down. Repeat until all the lasagne is used up, then pour the sauce over and sprinkle with mozzarella. Bake for 30 minutes until golden.
